items.text:
Szanowni aktorzy i aktorki

Dzień dobry, nazywam się Justyna Iwanowska i jestem studentką IV roku psychologii. Przygotowuję badanie, którego celem jest zbadanie związku pomiędzy perfekcjonizmem, lękiem a wypaleniem zawodowym u aktorów i muzyków. Badanie realizuje w ramach pracy magisterskiej przeprowadzanej w Instytucie Psychologii Uniwersytetu Łódzkiego.

Wypełnienie ankiety nie powinno zająć więcej niż 10 minut, a każdy głos jest dla mnie niezwykle cenny. Ankieta ma charakter anonimowy a wyniki będą analizowane grupowo jedynie w mojej pracy magisterskiej.

Byłabym bardzo wdzięczna za wypełnienie ankiety, a także rozesłanie jej dalej.
 Z góry dziękuję za poświęcony czas.

Kamed Studio 
12 maja
zdjęcia dzienno nocne 
Stawka 170 zł. płatne gotówką po planie

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o zgłoszenia z aktualnym zdjęciem I nr telefonu do kontaktu na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

Dopisek w tytule 12 maja

items.text:
CASTING – WARSZAWA

Poszukuję 2 aktorek do krótkometrażowego filmu dokumentalnego o cosplayu realizowanego na zaliczenie studiów filmowych.

Szukam przede wszystkim dwóch dziewczyn:
– w wieku około 15–18 lat (lub wyglądających młodo),
– o podobnym wzroście,
– podobnej budowie ciała,
– najlepiej również podobnych wizualnie od tyłu (włosy, sylwetka itp.).

Film będzie trwał około 4–5 minut i będzie oparty głównie na ruchu ciała oraz obecności na ekranie. aktorki nie mają kwestii mówionych.

Całość rozgrywa się na scenie teatralnej.
W filmie występują tylko:
– 2 aktorki,
– oraz jedna osoba, z którą przeprowadzany będzie wywiad na temat cosplayu.

Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie i potrwają 1 dzień.
Dojazd we własnym zakresie.

Oferuję 100 zł dla każdej aktorki oraz jedzenie na planie (np. pizza lub coś podobnego wybranego przez aktorkę).

Termin zdjęć:
Na pewno nie później niż 21 maja. Dokładna data jest jeszcze ustalana, ponieważ trwa organizacja i wynajem lokalizacji.

Dodatkowo dowiedziałem się od szkoły, że jedna ze stacji telewizyjnych (nazwa nie została jeszcze podana) jest zainteresowana odpłatnym pokazywaniem wybranych prac studentów mojej uczelni, więc istnieje szansa, że film zostanie pokazany w telewizji.

Do piątku wyślę storyboard (komiks bez dialogów pokazujący ruch aktorów), scenopis (plan wydarzeń filmu), a gdy tylko będę miał dostęp, prześlę również zdjęcia lokalizacji oraz podam jej dokładny adres.

W zgłoszeniu proszę wysłać:
– kilka aktualnych zdjęć,
– demo aktorskie / krótki filmik video zawierający krótką scenkę aktorską oraz pokazanie się z każdej strony,
– imię i nazwisko,
– wiek,
– wzrost,
– rozmiar ubrań.

⏰ Zgłoszenia można wysyłać do 14 maja do godziny 00:00.

 Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać:
– w wiadomości prywatnej,
– na e-mail: [maciejjozefkarolbuk@gmail.com](mailto:maciejjozefkarolbuk@gmail.com),
– lub pod numer telefonu: 734 160 222.

Poniżej w załączniku przesyłam również plan wydarzeń filmu.

items.text:
**FEATURE FILM CASTING CALL **

Hi everyone! I’m back with the final phase of casting for our feature film. Thank you for your incredible response to our project! Our lead casting is currently under consideration with our directors. We are now ready to round out the team and cast our supporting characters. Please see the roles below, and do not hesitate to submit for multiple roles. I hope to see you on set, it’s going to be a blast. Cheers to film in Colorado! 

**Here’s how to audition: **[https://forms.gle/1SyDbMkgmgzf87b28](https://forms.gle/1SyDbMkgmgzf87b28)

**DURANGO SEEMS LIKE A GREAT PLACE TO DIE**

**Feature Film**

Directors: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Writers: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Executive Producers: AJ Campli, Matt Bruggeman, Boulder Media House, Tyler Sapp, Chloe Chamberlain, Jill Coats, Crowded Table Pictures

Producer: Tyler Sapp

Casting Director: Chloe Chamberlain

Project Shoot Dates: 7/1-7/14 & 8/14-8/21

Location: Denver, CO / Boulder, CO / Durango, CO 

Logline: *After a heartbreaking divorce, Ezra begrudgingly joins his bohemian mother on a road trip across Colorado to help her die.  *

It’s a very funny movie, with serious undertones. And at its core – it’s a mother/son story. Our story is centered around Medical Aid in Dying and explores the relationships that really impact and shape our adult lives. 

**ROLES:**

**SUPPORTING**
*Rate $400/Day*

**COSMO** Late 60’s - Male - Ex-hippie - 3 Days

**JED & RAT** 35-75 - Males - Goons - 4 Days

**___**
**DAYPLAYER**

*Rate $350/Day* 

**DR. WILBUR** 50’s Male - Mustache, Turtleneck, Large Glasses - Founder of “Ellipses” - 1 Day

**ELLIPSES PATIENT (1, 2, 3)** 50-85 - Any Gender - 1 Day

**SLOANE** Early to Mid 30’s - Female - Waitress - 1 Day

**DR. STEPHEN RISSMILLER** 36 - Male - Professor - 1 Day

**BILL** 52 - Male - Academic Faculty - 1 Day

**KAYLA** 25 - Female - Graduate Student - 1 Day

**CASEY** 27 - Male - Graduate Student - 1 Day
___
**DAYPLAYER - NON-SPEAKING **
*Rate $200/Day*

**PICKLE BALL WIFE** 65-75 - Female - Strong Physical Comedy - 1 Day - Non-Speaking

**PICKLE BALL HUSBAND** 65-75 - Male - Strong Physical Comedy - 1 Day - Non-Speaking

**RECEPTIONIST** Any Age - Any Gender - Receptionist at “Ellipses” - 1 Day - Non-Speaking

___
**DAYPLAYER - VOICEOVER **
*Rate $150/Day*

**ABIGAIL** 30’s - Female - Ezra’s Ex-Wife - Voiceover Only - 1 Day

___

**BACKGROUND**

*Rate $75/Day*

**GRADUATE STUDENTS** 23-30 - Any Gender - English Majors - 1 Day

**DINER PATRONS** Any Age - Any Gender - 1 Day

**CEREMONY CROWD** Any Age - Any Gender - 1 Day

**Thank you again for your excitement and support! Please connect with us on our socials ****below**** for updates, further cast/crew calls, and to see when we’re filming in your neighborhood. Keep in touch!   - The Durango Team :)**

https://www.instagram.com/crowdedtablepictures?igsh=eHQ3OHg5cXpteDd2

items.text:
Joust - Folk Feature Casting Call
Title: Joust

Genre: (Comedy, Drama, Coming of Age)

Logline: Following a self-inflicted break up, a young man spends the summer reflecting on his actions that have had ripple effects beyond his understanding.

Roles:

TESSA - Female, 16-18 - A mostly confident, but aimless and introverted writer. The film is split into three distinct acts, and Tessa is the lead of the third act and co-lead of the second act. Lives a very quiet life, one that is presented as a somewhat aspirational lifestyle to the audience.

BEN - Male, 16-18 - A renaissance faire employee with a somewhat disgruntled but nerdy demeanor. Charming when in the presence of those he is most comfortable with, Ben's entire deal in this movie is that he is in a totally normal relationship and throws it away because his girlfriend seemed disinterested in him in a dream. Co-lead of the first and second acts.

GRACE - 16-18 - A career-driven and charming first year university student, studying experience design. Perceived by Ben as being a distant partner, she's really just going through a stressful period of time. Often switches between appearing as a free spirit in friendships/relationships, but somewhat corporate in professional/academic contexts. Co-lead of the first act.

Production Company: Beacon Releasing (Fully Indie/Folk, Self Produced by Joel Davis Warren)

Production Type: Indie, Folk, Micro-Budget

Contact Information: Inquire at my personal cell via text (719)-246-6149 or email cosummerfilm@gmail.com

Run Time: Feature

Compensation: Unpaid (Free food, reel deliverables, and IMDB/TMDB credits, though!)

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Contact me with either a reel, headshots, resume, or social media profile. One self tape may be requested. No specific due date, so I'll take this post down by the time I'm unable to take any more submissions.

Shooting Schedule: Intermittent shooting over the month of July, will schedule around our lead talent's schedules.

Filming Location: Colorado Springs

Additional Information: This is a folk feature film, meaning it is being entirely made as a hobby project with a very limited cast and crew, made on a VERY low budget. Anyone who can give a natural performance with an emphasis on improv, would be wonderful, regardless of experience level. Actors and non actors alike are welcome. The film will see a direct-to-YouTube release with a planned cast/crew premiere screening within the year. As stated, no financial compensation, so please keep that in mind!

Thanks so much for your time in reading this, and again, if you have any questions, please see the number or email above. :)

Circus Performer - Open for New Opportunities! 🎪✨
Professional Circus Performer | 4 Years Experience | Available Immediately

Hello! I am a professional circus artist with 4 years of experience performing in various local shows and national stages. I am currently fully available and seeking new opportunities for shows, tours, festivals, or professional contracts.

My Core Specialties:

• Cyr Wheel: Dynamic and high-energy performance.

• Free Ladder (Ladder Balancing): Expert balance and precision.

• Hat Manipulation / Juggling: Creative and entertaining hat skills.

I am a disciplined, hardworking performer ready to bring a unique spark to your event or circus troupe. Whether you are looking for a solo act or a team player, I am ready to hit the stage!

📩 Get in touch with me:

• Email: abnizersamson7@gmail.com

• WhatsApp: +251953464632

• Telegram: @abenezer_ladder

Status: Available for  international projects.

Feel free to share this post or tag someone who is looking for a professional performer!

#CircusPerformer #CyrWheel #LadderBalance #HatJuggling #CircusJobs #PerformerForHire #EthiopianCircus #AvailableNow

items.text:
Doctor Who Fan Film Casting Call
We’re looking for four actors to fill roles for a Doctor Who Fan Film Christmas Special due to film in July/August this year.

The roles:

Eleanor - A Young woman in her mid 20s, she lives alone and has a complicated relationship with her family 

Edwin - A Victorian watchmaker in his mid 20s, and ancestor to Eleanor 

Time Reaper - Mysterious villain seeking to kill Eleanor 

Chris - Modern day character who appears in the final seven of the episode 

Filming will take place in various locations around South London/Surrey such as Cheam, Morden, Sutton and Wimbledon. Exact locations are TBC

Exact dates are TBC but will fall during the 6 week school summer holiday 

As this is a fan film project unfortunately I am unable to offer payment as we do not make money from these projects. I can however offer travel money if it is needed.

If you’re interested send me a message or send an email to dc63productions@gmail.com

topComments.text: Hi there I have sent you an email 😊

items.title: CASTING CALL FOR A SHORT FILM

STAY TUNE GUYS….!

Rahat Shah,
A talented Fitness Model/Actor/Photographer and British Champion in Men’s Physique from Birmingham, UK! 

Hailing from a renowned art family in Pakistan’s film industry, Rahat’s creative genes are undeniable. With a string of achievements, including winning the British Champion award and Asians Beauty Pageant, Rahat has made a name for himself.

His upcoming Indian thriller film “Second Chance” Directed by Sachin Karande is set to release soon, promising to captivate audiences worldwide.

As a cover model for numerous magazines, Rahat’s charm and physique have won hearts. Through his journey, he aims to inspire others, proving that hard work and dedication can lead to success. Stay tuned for an exciting story of passion, talent, and triumph!

items.text:
**Casting Call – London **

Casting for an upcoming rehearsed reading as part of Omnibus Theatre’s 96Fest.

1hr queer comedy play taking place on the 3rd June, 8:30pm.

**Details:**
*  Location: Central London
*  Roles: Multiple genders, open to any race
*  Pay: Profit share of all ticket sales 

Must be free all day 3rd June & prior rehearsal dates will take place during of these dates:
* Wed, 27th May
* Fri, 29th May Mon
* 1st June
* Tue, 2nd June

**If you’re interested, please send:**
* A recent headshot
* Spotlight link (if you have one)
* Any showreel or previous work (if available)

OR
* A self tape recording (script extracts linked below)
* Your availability

**Email **[ewaynforth@gmail.com](mailto:ewaynforth@gmail.com) 

Link to casting treatment & script extracts for tapes:

items.summary:
**Casting Call – London **

Casting for an upcoming rehearsed reading as part of Omnibus Theatre’s 96Fest.

1hr queer comedy play taking place on the 3rd June, 8:30pm.

**Details:**
*  Location: Central London
*  Roles: Multiple genders, open to any race
*  Pay: Profit share of all ticket sales 

Must be free all day 3rd June & prior rehearsal dates will take place during of these dates:
* Wed, 27th May
* Fri, 29th May Mon
* 1st June
* Tue, 2nd June

**If you’re interested, please send:**
* A recent headshot
* Spotlight link (if you have one)
* Any showreel or previous work (if available)

OR
* A self tape recording (script extracts linked below)
* Your availability

**Email **[ewaynforth@gmail.com](mailto:ewaynforth@gmail.com) 

Link to casting treatment & script extracts for tapes:

[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Eb6i3X-SvBC7WMYBMJnyHMt9JNlO6w1B?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Eb6i3X-SvBC7WMYBMJnyHMt9JNlO6w1B?usp=sharing).

Feel free to share or tag someone who might be interested!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – KURZFILM „CARLINA“

Für unseren poetischen Kurzfilm *CARLINA* suchen wir Darsteller*innen für vier zentrale Rollen.

Der Film erzählt von Nähe, Sehnsucht, Verlust und unausgesprochenen Spannungen in der Abgeschiedenheit einer alpinen Bergwelt. Im Mittelpunkt stehen starke emotionale Präsenz, reduziertes Spiel und Ausdruck über Blick, Körpersprache und Stille.

📍 Drehort: Nähe Lunz am See, Niederösterreich
📅 Drehzeitraum: 05.06.2026 – 11.06.2026
🎞 Studentenproduktion / No-Budget
🍽 Unterkunft & Verpflegung vorhanden
🎥 Festival-Einreichungen geplant

Gesucht werden Darsteller*innen für die Rollen:
– Magdalena
– Johann
– Lukas
– Wolfgang

Alle weiteren Informationen zu Rollen, Anforderungen und Projekt findet ihr in den Bildern des Posts.

📩 Bewerbungen bitte bis spätestens **17.05.2026** an:
**hochland.kurzfilm@gmail.com**

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam PANÓW:

- Zbigniew Gosek (37) – drobny oszust, kieszonkowiec. Nerwowy, chaotyczny. Drobnej postury. Lekko zaniedbany i zapuszczony. Był skonfliktowany z Henrykiem. Pracuje na taksówce. Umie biegać. 
AKTOR PO SZKOLE LUB KURSACH
DATA: 26.05 i 27.05
STAWKA: 1400 zł netto za 2 dni

- Damian Piechoski (29) – pracownik gospodarstwa Henryka, okradł go po śmierci. Nie wyróżnia się z wyglądu, średnia budowa ciała. AKTOR PO SZKOLE LUB KURSACH
DATA: 26.05
STAWKA: 700 zł netto

- Mirek – Mirosław Bednarz (56) – rolnik, dalszy sąsiad Henryka, sprawca nieumyślnego zabójstwa. Krzepki, mocno zbudowany. Brutalny wobec żony, przemocowy. 
DATA: 27.05
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Sławek Szymkowiak (26) – znajomy Zbyszka, dresik, drobny złodziej.
DATA: 27.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl
W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach

sharedPost.text:
☀️ Czy czujecie już ten letni rytm? 🎶

Oficjalnie ruszamy z Ogólnopolskim Konkursem Piosenki On-Line „Wakacyjne Melodie 2026”! 🌊🎤 Wakacyjne Melodie powracają w wielkim stylu, a my szukamy wyjątkowych polskich talentów, które rozświetlą to lato!

Niezależnie od tego, czy masz 8, czy 50+ lat, jeśli muzyka gra w Twojej duszy, to miejsce jest stworzone właśnie dla Ciebie. Nagraj swoją ulubioną piosenkę w ogrodzie, na plaży lub w domowym zaciszu i daj się poznać całemu światu! 🌍✨

🔥 GORĄCA NOWOŚĆ W TEJ EDYCJI! 🔥

W tym roku przygotowaliśmy dla Was coś absolutnie wyjątkowego! Głosowanie Publiczności! 🗳️❤️ To oznacza, że oprócz profesjonalnego jury, Wasza widownia, znajomi, rodzina i fani będą mieli bezpośredni wpływ na wyniki i wybór laureatów. Szykuje się niesamowita zabawa i ogromne emocje!

🚀 Jak wziąć udział? To proste:

Nagraj swój występ wokalny.

Wypełnij krótki formularz zgłoszeniowy na naszej stronie.

Wyślij zgłoszenie i zbieraj głosy od publiczności!

📌 Przydatne linki:

📝 Zapisy i zgłoszenia: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/zgloszenie

🗳️ Więcej o Głosowaniu Publiczności: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/glosowanie

📜 Regulamin konkursu: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/regulamin

❓ Masz pytania? Sprawdź FAQ: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/faq

Nie czekaj, wyśpiewaj swoje marzenia i wejdź w te wakacje z muzyczną energią! 🌴🎵

#WakacyjneMelodie2026 #WyśpiewajMarzenia2026 #KonkursPiosenki #GłosowaniePubliczności #Muzyka #LetniRytm #KonkursOnline

items.summary: Let’s work 🎬🎬
items.title: Let’s work 🎬🎬

items.text:
Open Auditions
Looking forward to seeing you tomorrow or Sunday.

If you cannot make it but want to auditions, get in touch with us.

All audition materials are below.

sharedPost.text:
⚠️ AUDITION REMINDER! ⚠️ 
STOP WAVING THROUGH A WINDOW? STEP INTO THE AUDITION ROOM.
Open auditions for Dear Evan Hansen start tomorrow, and this is your sign to step into the spotlight! 👕

📍 Where: Harlow Playhouse 
🗓 When: * TOMORROW* (Tuesday 19th May) from 7:45pm
Sunday 24th May from 1:15pm
🔗 Audition Materials: https://tr.ee/fJRXmvUai8
🔞 Note: Auditions are open to anyone aged 18+ at the start of rehearsals in mid June.
If you have any issues making either date, please send us a DM right away so we can work something out.

#DearEvanHansen #HarlowPlayhouse #MusicalTheatreAuditions #UKTheatre #YouWillBeFound #WavingThroughAWindow #AmDram #EssexTheatre

items.text:
**CASTING CALL (TWO LEAD ACTING ROLES)**

**Project Title:** Pill Popper

**Project Type:** Student Short Film

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Director:** Margaret White

**Producer:** Hayden Perlov / Vancouver Film School

**Casting Director:** Margaret White / Hayden Perlov

**Audition Dates:** Self-tapes due by May 22nd 2026

**Audition Location:** Self-tapes only

**Call Back Dates:** May 24th 2026

*Call Back location/time will be shared after reviewing auditions*

**Shooting Dates:** June 6th-7th 2026

**Shooting Location:** Greater Vancouver Area

**Rates:** Unpaid. Catering and craft service provided.

**Submission Instructions:** Please email **pillpopper_vfs@outlook.com** for submission instructions and sides and indicate which role you’d like to be considered for.

**Synopsis:**

Iris (female, 20-25) is in the depths of her clinical depression. Despite being against prescription medication, Iris’ depression reaches a point where she decides to take her prescribed medicine

for the first time. While on the medication, Iris’ life becomes healthy and sustainable. One night, spent playing games with her friends, Iris remembers why she was so against medication in the 

first place- the dehumanization she sees in it -and pours hers down the kitchen disposal. Once again unmedicated, Iris’ depression becomes the darkest it’s ever been. Desperate and unknowing what to do, she meets with her psychiatrist who guides her back to taking the prescribed medication.

**Character Breakdowns:**

IRIS

Female/Female Presenting

20-25

Open Ethnicity

Iris is stuck in an apathetic depression. With her medication, she’s thoughtful and gentle, and spends her time contemplating her favorite things. The chemicals are in her brain now, but that doesn’t mean she always feels it in her heart, causing her to sometimes become reserved and melancholic. Still, Iris goes through the motions of her day with a smile on her face and a new level of energy, compliant to her psychiatrist’s instructions.

DR. WELL 

Any Gender

45-65

Open Ethnicity

Dr. Well is a forbearing, well-seasoned psychiatrist who works attentively and conscientiously with patients of all ages. Dr Well’s priority is persistently achieving positive results through their patients. While the patient’s well-being is always at the forefront of Dr. Well’s practice, they diplomatically brush past the patient’s experience to get to the results of the current treatment, always searching for the best outcome.

**Notes:**

(TW) Please note this script contains brief discussion of self harm between Iris and Dr. Well and implied self harm and suicidal ideation for Iris. The topic will be approached sensitively and

compassionately, putting the actors' comfort and well-being first. Keep this in mind when submitting your audition. Resources/contacts will be available throughout production.

BACKGROUND CASTING CALL - BOWLING ALLEY PATRONS
Hi!

We are looking for background for our upcoming short film filming May 20th - 22nd, 2026.

We are looking for a DIVERSE RANGE of actors, of all ages 18+, nationalities, and gender identities, to play a wide range of BOWLING ALLEY PATRONS.

Please note this is an unpaid opportunity but you will be provided lots of very delicious food and lunch on set!!

We are filming in Port Coquitlam.

Please let us know which days you are available, you can choose to do only one of the days, two, or all three days!

If interested, please email or DM me or fill out the following form —[ https://forms.gle/zaSui6WJ2YCMz62E6](https://forms.gle/zaSui6WJ2YCMz62E6)

items.text:
**SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM**

***“SEVEN TIMES, SEVENTH”***

**Director:** Hân Phạm

**Producers:** Shakil Jessa, Alger Ji-Liang

**Category:** Independent Short Film - Funded by BC Arts Council

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh, Hân Phạm

**Union Status:** UBCP/ACTRA ULB

**Compensation:** $150/day. Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-5, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, demo reel/resume (if you have) and tell us a little bit about yourself!

**LOGLINE:** After her death, Bay, a Vietnamese hairdresser, lingers as a spirit in her old salon. Over 49 Days, visits from her loved ones awaken memories of care, regret, and joy—revealing her quiet life as a matriarchal archive of survival and love.

****OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED****

**BAY - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, Late 40s-60s***

Bay is a middle-aged Vietnamese woman who arrived in Canada in the 80s as a boat woman. As the owner of a hair salon, she's hardworking, warm and caring, but is short-tempered and strict towards her staff and her family. Raising a child alone in unfamiliar land as a single mom, she hides the hardships and secrets of her past from her daughter, Dan. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

**HUONG - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, 30s-40s***

Huong is a stay-at-home auntie and wife who frequents the beauty salon. She is casual and overly curious, loves gossip, and complains a lot about her husband, but is lighthearted at her core. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

**HONG - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, 30s-40s***

Hong is an experienced hairdresser and a friend of Bay. She is kind, understanding and open-minded. She likes to help others resolve conflicts. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

items.text:
Self tape services
Hi guys!

I hope you’re well. I’m looking to start offering self tape coaching and filming services for young actors, mainly aged 5–21

With self tapes now being such a huge part of the casting process, many auditions are done remotely, and I’ve noticed there’s a real need for young actors to have guidance and support throughout that process.

The way my service works is:

* Parents or actor (if above 18) would contact me directly regarding an audition/self-tape request.

* I’d review the brief and script beforehand so I can understand the character and prepare how best to coach the actor.

* I’d also advise parents/actor on suitable outfit choices based on the casting brief.

* During the session, I’d help the actor feel comfortable, guide them through the script, run practice takes, and offer coaching and direction throughout.

* I would then film the self-tape (acting as the reader where needed), edit the footage, and send the finished tape back ready for submission to their agent or casting director.

I have personal experience with auditioning and working on a film set, so I understand what casting teams are looking for in a strong self tape. While self-tapes don’t need a large professional studio setup, having the right guidance, lighting, framing, and environment can make a huge difference and really help the actor feel confident and prepared. 

If the actor has an in person audition and just wants someone to coach them through their audition script before their audition day I can offer this aswell! 

I am agency represented with experience in film and stage. 

If this is something anyone would potentially be interested in discussing further, please send me a message and we can go through further details.

Thank you!

Samantha x

topComments.text: Hi how much do you charge got this
Potentially - but self tapes often have such a quick turnaround that I have seen people try to offer this in the past but the short time scale makes it difficult in practice.

items.text:
**Now Casting: Have You Had FLAWLESS Facial Plastic Surgery? (Major Cable Network: Paid + Cash Prize) **

* *Have you had plastic surgery on your face but no one can tell? *
* *Do you have a flawless, natural-looking appearance that gives nothing away?* 
* Is the type of work that no one can detect? 

Casting producers are looking for people in the greater Los Angeles area who’ve had cosmetic facial procedures—not simply Botox or fillers—to take part in a fun, light-hearted social experiment competition series. If you’re proud of your look and have a fun personality, we want to meet you! This is a one-day shoot in the Los Angeles area. Selected participants will 💰**BE PAID**💰 and will also have the opportunity to win a cash prize.

For more information or to apply, email socialexperimentcasting01@gmail.com **Or apply directly here: **[https://socialexperimentparticipantform.castingcrane.com/](https://socialexperimentparticipantform.castingcrane.com/)

topComments.text: "We would like to meet the brainwashed idiots who are mentally ill enough to fall for the plastic surgery scam, to try to understand that high level of mental illness so that we can trick more idiots."

items.text:
Announcing a new Demidov Three Month Immersion Course taking place September through November this year fully in person at Pushkin House in London! 🎭🎉

The Demidov Three Month Immersion Course is for actors who want to dive more deeply into the work of the Demidov School.

The course will give actors the opportunity to work more intensively and in greater depth on certain aspects of the Demidov curriculum. The course will include working with the Foundations of the entire technique, rooted in Demidov’s signature Etudes, plus Inexact (Creative) Repetition, The Power of Circumstances, and his unique approach to the development of Character.

The course is structured to flow seamlessly from one aspect of the work to the next, allowing actors to stay immersed in the work and organically utilise what they are learning as the course progresses.

The Demidov Organic Acting Technique empowers actors to connect deeply with their unique creative individuality by guiding them to recognise and trust their innate artistic instincts. It is an approach that cultivates faith in the actors’ own talent and fosters spontaneous performances that emerge organically, allowing actors to consistently access inspiration and fully express their true creative potential.

Click the link 🔗 below to read more and apply for the course!

https://www.demidovstudiolondon.com/courses/demidov-three-month-immersion-course-septnov26

Photo by 📸: [@kelsey_m_j](https://www.instagram.com/kelsey_m_j/?hl=en)
~
Demidov Studio London
The UK’s only certified Demidov Acting School
Located at Pushkin House, 5a Bloomsbury Square, London WC1A 2TA
demidovstudiolondon.com
All classes and courses taught by studio Founder & Director [@andrei_biziorek](https://www.instagram.com/andrei_biziorek/?hl=en)

items.text: I am one of the Casting Directors for the upcoming StudioCanal feature film JOSEPHINE BAKER. We are currently seeking the role of **JOSEPHINE BAKER AT 12 YEARS OLD **and would like to put out this flyer for any kids who would be interested in auditioning. **We’re ideally looking for someone aged 12-16 to play 12.  No acting experience needed, but dance experience encouraged. **

items.text: Poszukiwana osoba, która chciałaby podjąć się nagrania ślubu cywilnego w urzędzie w Gdyni i wesela w knajpie w Gdańsku w godzinach (14-20 urząd + knajpa) bądź (12-18 przygotowania+urzad+knajpa). Zapewniamy jedzenie i picie. Budżet ok 5 tys. Nie podobają nam się oferowane usługi. Chodzi o surowy wręcz reportaż z dialogami z offu, ewentualnie lekki podkład. Żadne drony i piosenka na cały klip z obrazkami. Fotografa już mamy.

items.text:
🎬 SZUKAMY MŁODYCH STATYSTÓW DO TELEDYSKU — KRAKÓW, 25 MAJA

TY. Tak, dokładnie Ty.

Jesteśmy małym, młodym zespołem i właśnie nagrywamy nasz pierwszy teledysk. Dużo energii, zero budżetu korporacji — robimy to sami i robimy to szczerze.

Klip to parodia. Śmiejemy się z tyranii w branży gastronomicznej — z tego całego systemu, który wyciska młodych ludzi jak cytrynę i udaje, że to "praca z pasją". Znasz to? Będziesz wiedział, o co chodzi.

Nie ma żadnych wymagań. Przyjdź, jak chcesz, w czym chcesz — w garniturze, dresie, kostiumie, cokolwiek. Każdy jest tu idealny na tę rolę. Szukamy ludzi, nie typów.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📍 Kraków

📅 25 maja (niedziela)

⏱ 1–3 godziny Twojego czasu

💸 Non-profit — robimy to z pasji

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Chętny/a? Więcej szczegółów w wiadomości prywatnej

Udostępnij dalej 🔁 — może ktoś z Twoich znajomych właśnie tego szuka.

Für einen Werbedreh werden 6 Statisten gesucht, gedreht wird am 26.05. in Stuttgart. Es wird ein Live-Event sein mit Bezug zur Weltmeisterschaft 2026. 

Gesucht werden Männer im alter von 20-40 Jahren, die einen Lieferfahrer spielen.
Gedreht wird von 11 - 22 Uhr. 

Bei interesse bitte auch direkt ein Foto mit schicken. 

Das ganze wird natürlich bezahlt! 

Liebe Grüße und bis bald

items.text:
SEEKING HMUA PAID
Looking for a HMUA to assist on a Non-Union feature film on Monday, May 18th and Tuesday may 19th. Looking for someone who can help with light glam on female talent and touch ups on background actors! This is a Paid position! 

Location: Pittsburg, PA 

Dates: May 18th-19th 

Rate: $250/12hrs

To apply, email me: sarah.turnermua@gmail.com

Even if you’re not Available for both days, please email me specifying which day you are available if interested! You will also likely not be needed the entire 12 hours but will still be paid the full amount regardless. KIT NOT PROVIDED, BRING YOUR OWN SUPPLIES! Food/crafty will be provided on set and you will receive on screen credit!

items.text:
Looking for A2/Sound Engineer for ‘Next to Normal’ (CHI)
My company Scene Five Productions is in search of an A2/Sound Engineer for our upcoming production of Next to Normal.

We are looking for a candidate who is comfortable live-mixing our actors mics. 

Our production runs over two weekends, at the Bramble Arts Loft: July 24th-26th and July 31-August 2nd. Additionally, our tech days are July 20th-23rd.

This position will have a stipend of $500.

If interested, please email scenefiveproductions@gmail.com with your resume!

items.text:
Barcelona Casting – Cinematic Fashion Film
I’m creating a visual fashion film exploring movement, identity, and presence—shot across Barcelona.

This is a non-compensated collaboration (TFP) for artists who want to build strong, film-quality portfolio work.

Looking for:

2 male + 3 female actors/models

Expressive, natural performers

Comfortable with visual storytelling (minimal dialogue)

This project is about:

Emotion over posing

Atmosphere over perfection

Film over content

You’ll receive professionally edited footage for your reel.

If this resonates with you, DM with your work + availability.

For an hour and a half

And then, there’s Mom! 

SIBLINGS 
a live reading 
Tuesday, May 26, 8:30 pm
CO-PILOTS READING SERIES
At the Elysian Theatre - 
The Vault Space, 
1944 Riverside Drive 

The lives of three Indian American sibling roommates are dismantled when their newly single mother decides to move in. 

Written by 
CHRISELLE ALMEIDA-BRIGGS
Cast: Shay Ali, Sharmila Devar, Rishi Jaiswal, Swati Kapila, and yours truly - Suni M!

Tickets 🎟️: https://www.elysiantheater.com/shows/copilots0526

items.text:
🎬 OPEN CASTING CALL – VERTICAL SHORT DRAMA SERIES
A new independent production house is now casting for an upcoming Vertical Short Drama Production created for platforms including YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, Vimeo, DramaBox, ReelShort, GoodShort, DramaWave & more.

This is an ongoing multi-episode micro-drama series with future opportunities for festival submissions and global digital distribution.

CASTING ROLES:

🔹 2 MALE TALENTS

Role Type: Hard Men / Security / Cartel-Mafia Crew

Age Range: 30s–40s

Ethnicity: Open

No acting experience required. Strong presence, confidence, and character appearance preferred. Previous acting or performance experience is a bonus.

🔹 3 FEMALE TALENTS

Role Type: Cartel Business Associates

Age Range: 20s–30s

Ethnicity: Open

Seeking confident, expressive personalities capable of portraying strong on-screen presence.

FILMING LOCATION:

📍 London, UK

PRODUCTION PERIOD:

Mid-Summer Production Schedule

July / August / September 2026

Please note:

This is an ongoing production with rotating casts across various episodes. Not all selected talents will be required for every shoot date. Casting selections will be made based on episode requirements and character suitability. Because it's a Independent project, this will only be Travel Reimbursement for the time being.

PROJECT DETAILS:

• Independent Self-Funded Start-Up Production

• Viral Social Media Focused Content

• Short Form Cinematic Drama Series

• Opportunities for future exposure through global micro-drama platforms & vertical film festivals

Selected applicants will receive:

• Character Backstory & Synopsis

• Production Information

• Online Zoom Casting Interview with Cast & Crew

• Opportunity to creatively contribute to character interpretation

PREFERRED:

Applicants already based in London, UK or surrounding areas.

TO APPLY:

Please E-MAIL the following:

• Recent Headshot / Portfolio Photos

• Full Name

• Age

• Contact Details

• Any Previous Experience (Optional)

IMPORTANT:

❌ NO DM’s

❌ NO INBOX MESSAGES

Applications or questions sent through social media direct messages will not be responded to.

Follow instructions carefully and apply via E-MAIL only to: Mikeybharj@gmail.com

Further details will be shared with shortlisted applicants.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Iry CASTING CALL α verticalseries vertical series LONDON, UNITED KINGDOM 100'

items.text:
🎬 OPEN CASTING CALL – VERTICAL SHORT DRAMA SERIES
A new independent production house is now casting for an upcoming Vertical Short Drama Production created for platforms including YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, Vimeo, DramaBox, ReelShort, GoodShort, DramaWave & more.

This is an ongoing multi-episode micro-drama series with future opportunities for festival submissions and global digital distribution.

CASTING ROLES:

🔹 2 MALE TALENTS

Role Type: Hard Men / Security / Cartel-Mafia Crew

Age Range: 30s–40s

Ethnicity: Open

No acting experience required. Strong presence, confidence, and character appearance preferred. Previous acting or performance experience is a bonus.

🔹 3 FEMALE TALENTS

Role Type: Cartel Business Associates

Age Range: 20s–30s

Ethnicity: Open

Seeking confident, expressive personalities capable of portraying strong on-screen presence.

FILMING LOCATION:

📍 London, UK

PRODUCTION PERIOD:

Mid-Summer Production Schedule

July / August / September 2026

Please note:

This is an ongoing production with rotating casts across various episodes. Not all selected talents will be required for every shoot date. Casting selections will be made based on episode requirements and character suitability. Because it's a Independent project, this will only be Travel Reimbursement for the time being.

PROJECT DETAILS:

• Independent Self-Funded Start-Up Production

• Viral Social Media Focused Content

• Short Form Cinematic Drama Series

• Opportunities for future exposure through global micro-drama platforms & vertical film festivals

Selected applicants will receive:

• Character Backstory & Synopsis

• Production Information

• Online Zoom Casting Interview with Cast & Crew

• Opportunity to creatively contribute to character interpretation

PREFERRED:

Applicants already based in London, UK or surrounding areas.

TO APPLY:

Please E-MAIL the following:

• Recent Headshot / Portfolio Photos

• Full Name

• Age

• Contact Details

• Any Previous Experience (Optional)

IMPORTANT:

❌ NO DM’s

❌ NO INBOX MESSAGES

Applications or questions sent through social media direct messages will not be responded to.

Follow instructions carefully and apply via E-MAIL only to: Mikeybharj@gmail.com

Further details will be shared with shortlisted applicants.

items.text:
**Casting Call – London **

Casting for an upcoming rehearsed reading as part of Omnibus Theatre’s 96Fest.

1hr queer comedy play taking place on the 3rd June, 8:30pm.

**Details:**
*  Location: Central London
*  Roles: Multiple genders, open to any race
*  Pay: Profit share of all ticket sales 

Must be free all day 3rd June & prior rehearsal dates will take place during of these dates:
* Wed, 27th May
* Fri, 29th May Mon
* 1st June
* Tue, 2nd June

**If you’re interested, please send:**
* A recent headshot
* Spotlight link (if you have one)
* Any showreel or previous work (if available)

OR
* A self tape recording (script extracts linked below)
* Your availability

**Email **[ewaynforth@gmail.com](mailto:ewaynforth@gmail.com) 

Link to casting treatment & script extracts for tapes:

[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Eb6i3X-SvBC7WMYBMJnyHMt9JNlO6w1B?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Eb6i3X-SvBC7WMYBMJnyHMt9JNlO6w1B?usp=sharing).

Feel free to share or tag someone who might be interested!

items.text:
Doctor Who Fan Film Casting Call
We’re looking for four actors to fill roles for a Doctor Who Fan Film Christmas Special due to film in July/August this year.

The roles:

Eleanor - A Young woman in her mid 20s, she lives alone and has a complicated relationship with her family 

Edwin - A Victorian watchmaker in his mid 20s, and ancestor to Eleanor 

Time Reaper - Mysterious villain seeking to kill Eleanor 

Chris - Modern day character who appears in the final seven of the episode 

Filming will take place in various locations around South London/Surrey such as Cheam, Morden, Sutton and Wimbledon. Exact locations are TBC

Exact dates are TBC but will fall during the 6 week school summer holiday 

As this is a fan film project unfortunately I am unable to offer payment as we do not make money from these projects. I can however offer travel money if it is needed.

If you’re interested send me a message or send an email to dc63productions@gmail.com

topComments.text: Just wondering why your Victorian watchmaker needs to be in his mid 20’s, are you allergic to people over 30? I would have thought a watchmaker in his 50’s would be more credible (still excludes me as I am now 60 so I’m not commenting in the hope that I would be considered)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM PROJECT 🎬

We are currently casting REAL ACTORS for an upcoming passion-driven short film project.

This is a VOLUNTEER project, but it offers valuable experience, networking opportunities, exposure, and a chance to be part of something powerful and cinematic.

THE GOOD NEWS IS: We are NOT looking for extras.
We are looking for dedicated actors who can truly perform.

REQUIREMENTS:

• Must know how to act confidently
• Must be comfortable performing action/stunt SCENES even if it's your first time. 
• Passion, discipline, and commitment are important
• Team players with positive energy

This project is focused on building strong talent and creating high-quality work together.

📍Location details and full project information will be discussed in person.
🎭 Roles and shoot details will also be discussed directly with selected applicants.

If you believe you have the talent, confidence, and passion for film — contact 0639889467. 

#Casting #actionfilm #shortfilm #SouthAfricanCinema #actionmovie2026

🎭 **Casting Female Performers – KPop Demon Hunters Theme (HUNTR/X)** 🎤✨

We’re casting **2 female performers (16+ / 18+)** for a fun, high-energy children’s party experience!

## 💖 Roles:

🩷 **Mira**
🖤 **Zoey ** 

## 📅 Event Details:

📍 Kinnelon, NJ
🗓️ May 16, 2026

⏰ Arrival: 4:15 PM
🎉 Performance: 5:00 – 6:00 PM

## 🎭 What You’ll Do:

✨ Meet & greet with kids
🎶 Music & dance interaction
🎈 Simple balloon twisting *(can teach basics!)*
💫 Fun, high-energy character engagement

## 💰 Pay:

**$140 flat rate**

## 🌟 We’re looking for:

✔ Reliable & punctual

Novel Productions is casting **two roles** for a small **30-second Brand Video**

**Shoot Location:** Vancouver, BC

**Shoot Date:** May 18, 2026 (4 hours)

**Compensation:** Flat rate of $250

**ROLES:**

• **Business Owner** — Age **25–40** | Male, ethnicity open

• **Marketing Director** — Age **25–40** | Male, ethnicity open

**SUBMISSIONS:**

Please send **headshot, acting resume, and reel (if available)** to: **casting@novelproductions.ca**

**Subject line:**

*Novel Casting - Role Name - Your Name*

This is a non-union flat-rate project intended for digital usage.

Selected submissions will be contacted with sides and instructions for self-tape auditions.

We encourage submissions from actors of all backgrounds.

items.text:
Casting Call for non-speaking product video
I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for: 1 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age late 20's, 30's or 40's.

Attached are some refence photos of talent appearances (and her notes) that our client likes. Any male is welcome to apply as all submissions will be reviewed and forwarded to the client for final selection.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face with a razor on camera. 

Location: TBD - either White Rock or New West 

Date: TBD - sometime before the end of May. We will work with your schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 for approximately 3 hours.

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

items.text:
**CASTING CALL (Vancouver) — WICKEDWOLF MEDIA**

Short comedic project filming in the next 2–3 weeks. Shoot will last approximately 2.5 hours. Compensation: $150 flat per role. Non-union.

Seeking 5–6 high-energy, native English-speaking performers (M/F), ages 18–45. Local applicants only. Shoot date will be finalized after cast selection based on availability; ideally an afternoon shoot.

Role: Performers will portray a group of friends playing an indie adult party game — loud, varied, and highly expressive laughter, plus improvised comments and reactions. This is fast, funny, and irreverent.

To apply: Please message here OR email a recent photo and brief bio or resume link to michael@wickedwolf.media. Please include your city and phone number.

Submission deadline: May 22, 5pm.

topComments.text: Michael, could you provide a shoot location and date?
Do I need to be a Caucasian to apply?

items.text:
📸 **POSZUKIWANI DZIECIĘCY MODELE W WIEKU 4-6 LAT** 

Szukamy małych modeli do wyjątkowej sesji foto i wideo! Jeśli Twoje dziecko czuje się swobodnie przed obiektywem i kocha przytulne wnętrza, to ogłoszenie jest dla Was ✨

📅 **SZCZEGÓŁY ZLECENIA:**
* **Kiedy:** Początek czerwca (dokładne daty do ustalenia)
* **Gdzie:** Sklep z meblami dziecięcymi w **Warszawie**
* **Zakres:** Łącznie **3 sesje** (każda ok. 1-2h). Można zgłosić się na jedną, dwie lub wszystkie trzy
* **Stylistyka:** Meble drewniane, scenografia w stylu skandynawskim i boho (przytulna, ciepła)

🎨 **O MNIE:**  Jestem **fotografem z 20-letnim stażem** i **projektantką** po studiach artystycznych. Zapewniam pełen profesjonalizm i luźną, pełną humoru atmosferę ✨

🌟 **CZEGO OCZEKUJEMY?**
* Wiek dziecka: **4-6 lat**
* Chęci do współpracy i cierpliwości podczas sesji

⏱ **PRZEBIEG SESJI:**
* **Oswojenie:** zaczynamy od krótkiego zapoznania, by dziecko poczuło się swobodnie w nowym miejscu
* **Naturalność:** sesja opiera się na zabawie i interakcji z meblami (czytanie, układanie zabawek) bez sztywnego pozowania
* **Foto & Wideo:** równolegle realizujemy ujęcia fotograficzne oraz krótkie nagrania wideo
* **Komfort:** pracujemy w tempie dziecka, dbając o przerwy i bezstresową atmosferę
* **Czas:** całość trwa od **1 do 2 godzin**, aby zachować dobrą zabawę i energię małego modela

💰 **WYNAGRODZENIE:** poproszę o wysłanie proponowanych stawek na priv

📩 **JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?** Proszę o komentarz z informacjami:
1. **Imię dziecka.**
2. **Dyspozycyjność:** w ilu sesjach możecie wziąć udział? (1, 2 czy 3)
3. Mile widziane aktualne zdjęcie (w komentarzu lub na priv)

W załączniku inspiracje znalezione w internecie jako wizualizacja pomysłu na sesję.
Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🧸

items.text:
BYDGOSZCZ / okolice

PILNIE szukamy mężczyzny do roli OCHRONIARZA (security) do nowego serialu „In Cold Eyes”.

Zdjęcia: 18 maja
Stawka: 400 zł brutto za 1 dzień zdjęciowy

Szukamy wysokiego, dobrze zbudowanego, charakterystycznego mężczyzny o typowej prezencji ochroniarza.
Wzrost orientacyjnie od 180 cm.

Szukamy wyłącznie osób z Bydgoszczy lub okolic, które mogą samodzielnie dojechać na plan zdjęciowy.

sharedPost.text:
Hi guys,
I hope you’re well. I’m looking to start offering self tape coaching and filming services for young actors, mainly aged 5–18.
With self tapes now being such a huge part of the casting process, many auditions are done remotely, and I’ve noticed there’s a real need for young actors to have guidance and support throughout that process.
The way my service works is:
* Parents would contact me directly regarding an audition/self-tape request.
* I’d review the brief and script beforehand so I can understand the character and prepare how best to coach the actor.
* I’d also advise parents on suitable outfit choices based on the casting brief.
* During the session, I’d help the actor feel comfortable, guide them through the script, run practice takes, and offer coaching and direction throughout.
* I would then film the self-tape (acting as the reader where needed), edit the footage, and send the finished tape back ready for submission to their agent or casting director.
I have personal experience with auditioning and working on a film set, so I understand what casting teams are looking for in a strong self tape. While self-tapes don’t need a large professional studio setup, having the right guidance, lighting, framing, and environment can make a huge difference and really help the actor feel confident and prepared. 
If the actor has an in person audition and just wants someone to coach them through their audition script before their audition day I can offer this aswell! 
I am agency represented with experience in film and stage. 
If this is something you’d potentially be interested in discussing further, please send me a message and we can go through further details.
Thank you!
Samantha x

🎬 CASTING CALL — As The Light Fades  
   
We are currently looking for a young Black male actor, high school age, for an upcoming role in our psychological crime thriller, As The Light Fades.  
   
Details:  
• High school age appearance  
• Black male actor  
• Height max: 5’9”  
• Filming in Colorado Springs  
• Shooting begins in June  
• Deferred pay  
• IMDb credit provided  
   
This is a grounded, emotionally driven project with a strong focus on performance and character work.  
   
To apply, please private message A.j. Bennett with:  
• Headshot or recent photos  
• Age  
• Height  
• Acting experience (if applicable)  
• Phone number and email  
   
#AsTheLightFades #CastingCall #ColoradoActors #IndieFilm #FilmCasting

items.title: Casting call

items.text:
🎬 OPEN CASTING CALL – VERTICAL SHORT DRAMA SERIES
A new independent production house is now casting for an upcoming Vertical Short Drama Production created for platforms including YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, Vimeo, DramaBox, ReelShort, GoodShort, DramaWave & more.

This is an ongoing multi-episode micro-drama series with future opportunities for festival submissions and global digital distribution.

CASTING ROLES:

🔹 2 MALE TALENTS

Role Type: Hard Men / Security / Cartel-Mafia Crew

Age Range: 30s–40s

Ethnicity: Open

No acting experience required. Strong presence, confidence, and character appearance preferred. Previous acting or performance experience is a bonus.

🔹 3 FEMALE TALENTS

Role Type: Cartel Business Associates

Age Range: 20s–30s

Ethnicity: Open

Seeking confident, expressive personalities capable of portraying strong on-screen presence.

FILMING LOCATION:

📍 London, UK

PRODUCTION PERIOD:

Mid-Summer Production Schedule

July / August / September 2026

Please note:

This is an ongoing production with rotating casts across various episodes. Not all selected talents will be required for every shoot date. Casting selections will be made based on episode requirements and character suitability. Because it's a Independent project, this will only be Travel Reimbursement for the time being.

PROJECT DETAILS:

• Independent Self-Funded Start-Up Production

• Viral Social Media Focused Content

• Short Form Cinematic Drama Series

• Opportunities for future exposure through global micro-drama platforms & vertical film festivals

Selected applicants will receive:

• Character Backstory & Synopsis

• Production Information

• Online Zoom Casting Interview with Cast & Crew

• Opportunity to creatively contribute to character interpretation

PREFERRED:

Applicants already based in London, UK or surrounding areas.

TO APPLY:

Please E-MAIL the following:

• Recent Headshot / Portfolio Photos

• Full Name

• Age

• Contact Details

• Any Previous Experience (Optional)

IMPORTANT:

❌ NO DM’s

❌ NO INBOX MESSAGES

Applications or questions sent through social media direct messages will not be responded to.

Follow instructions carefully and apply via E-MAIL only to: Mikeybharj@gmail.com

Further details will be shared with shortlisted applicants.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'फिल्म इंडस्ट्री मधील सर्व कलाकार, तंत्रजञ 9 सुवर्णसंधी ۱۰ कलाकार तंत्रज्ञ निर्माते दिन्दर्शक एडिटर टेकनिकल टीम कोणत्याही चित्रपट सेना, महामंडळ, फेंडरेशन, युनियन किंवा असोसिएशनचे कार्ड दाखवा आणि आमच्या संघटनेमध्ये 1 फ्री मेंबरशिप वर्षासाठी मिळवा! INDUSTRY FEDERATION ASSOCIATION FILM CORPORATION UNION संघटनेचे उइंहिष्ट कलाकार तंत्रज्ञांसाठी एक मजबूत व्यासपीठ कायदेशीर मदत मार्गदर्शन रोजगाराच्या संधी व प्रोजेक्ट्सची माहिती DIRECTOR कौशल्य विकास व वर्कशॉप्स सन्मान, सुरक्षा व हक्कांसाठी लढा या नव्या परिवाराचा भाग व्हा आणि फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीच्या प्रगतीत सहभागी व्हा! रोहित प्रकाशशेठ पारख फिल्म मेकर 9850049002 PRODU CTION SCENE TAЖE ROLL DIRECTOR CAMERA DATE'

Casting Call
For my Halloween party and trailer. A comeback featuring a brand-new concept—something that has never been seen before here in Germany.
Are you an actor, singer, dancer, model, acrobat, musician, performer, artist, fire-breather, drag queen, magician? or do you possess another talent that you are eager to show to me and my Jury ?

Düsseldorf: May 22nd
Cologne: June 12th

Application: castingvhn@yahoo.com

items.text:
Hi! Wir sind Souk Social (Social Media Agentur aus Wien) und suchen neue Brandfaces für bezahlte Shootings
für verschiedenste Unternehmen (Restaurants, Ärzte, Retail, etc.).

💸 15–30 € / Stunde
📍 WIEN
📹 Reels & TikTok
✨ kein Schauspiel nötig

Interesse?
Mail an: connect@souk-social.at

Bitte mit:
Name, Alter, Telefon, Instagram, Bild, Erfahrung + Deutsch-Level

Wir melden uns innerhalb weniger Tage 🙌

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of phone, gelato and ice cream

topComments.text: Ihre Überlegungen sind sehr gründlich, was allen viel Zeit gespart hat.🙂🙂

items.text:
Leads needed for music video series
3/13: Updated with pay rate.

Casting call  for a major record label music video series. In person auditions are scheduled for June 13th in Atlanta.

Please be registered in the BaLinda Michaels Talent Agency Extras Database before applying. Visit [https://linktr.ee/bmta_extras](https://linktr.ee/bmta_extras) to get started. Not the role for you? We encourage you to register to be eligible for all the latest casting opportunities. 

Then email bmtaextras@gmail.com with the subject line “Music Video Submission”. Please include your full name, current headshot, confirm your availability. We will reach out via email with further information. Thank you!

items.text:
CASTING CALL 

Looking for a male actor/background performer (18-45 y.o) for a small role in an indie drama/thriller short film

ROLE:
• Civilian / victim role (“dead body” scene)
• No acting experience needed
• No dialogue

PROJECT INFO:
• Non-union / unpaid passion project
• Food + screen credit + reel footage
• Filming in Calgary
• Needed June 4-5, approximately 7:30 pm - 12 am
• Preferably available both days

If interested, please DM me with a recent photo and your availability
or send to email vburykin3@gmail.com

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
🚨HIRING A SEAMSTRESS🚨
We’re looking for an experienced seamstress to create costumes for our live touring shows across the USA 🇺🇸✨
If you’ve got the energy, experience and creativity to help bring our productions to life, we want to see you!
📩 Apply now
Send your resume, portfolio and experience details to:
👉 casting@taconhyentertainment.com

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'NOW HIRING COSTUME MAKER SEAMSTRESS Taconhy Entertainment is SEEKING an EXPERIENCED COSTUME MAKER SEAMSTRESS to create costumes for live performance shows. WE ARE LOOKING FOR: Experienced costume construction for stage/entertainment productions. Strong skills in tailoring, pattern making, and garment construction. Ability to create durable, high-quality stage costumes. Experience working with performance costumes is highly valued. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE IN: Designing and/or constructing costumes for shows, theater, dance, or live entertainment. Working with stretch, specialty fabrics, and stage-ready materials. Alterations, fittings, and professional finishing details. SEND CURRENT: Resume/ CV Portfolio (photos of previous work) Experience details. casting@taconhyentertainment.co'

items.text:
**Casting Call – London **

Casting for an upcoming rehearsed reading as part of Omnibus Theatre’s 96Fest.

1hr queer comedy play taking place on the 3rd June, 8:30pm.

**Details:**
*  Location: Central London
*  Roles: Multiple genders, open to any race
*  Pay: Profit share of all ticket sales 

Must be free all day 3rd June & prior rehearsal dates will take place during of these dates:
* Wed, 27th May
* Fri, 29th May Mon
* 1st June
* Tue, 2nd June

**If you’re interested, please send:**
* A recent headshot
* Spotlight link (if you have one)
* Any showreel or previous work (if available)

OR
* A self tape recording (script extracts linked below)
* Your availability

**Email **[ewaynforth@gmail.com](mailto:ewaynforth@gmail.com) 

Link to casting treatment & script extracts for tapes:

[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Eb6i3X-SvBC7WMYBMJnyHMt9JNlO6w1B?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Eb6i3X-SvBC7WMYBMJnyHMt9JNlO6w1B?usp=sharing).

Feel free to share or tag someone who might be interested!

May be a graphic of text that says 'WHAT IS ΙT? Psychosexual is a new play written by Ellis Waynforth. Logline: Boundaries blur between therapist and his Psychosexual, a newest a couple' S clients in queer comedy of commitment. comedic This play is a relationship themes of regret, passion and flits between humour and topics but ensures to throughout. drama with It morality. more serious stay grounded Performers will be paid as part of a profit share from all ticket sales.'

MICHAEL: Male presenting, queer Conflicted, naive, lonely (25-35) JOHN: Male presenting, gay (30-40) Charming, impulsive, needy SASHA: Male presenting, gay Guarded, pragmatic, proud (35-45) ALICE: Female presenting, Warm, perceptive, candid queer (35-50) Further character descriptions and information the casting treatment linked below. are in'

Hey everyone!
Im looking for some actors for an upcoming shoot for the jewellery brand Taj Jewels.

This will take place on Thursday 21st May around 9.15am-1pm (tbc)

Southall, London

I’m looking for 1x older male approx 60+ 

+

2x gay male couples approx 20-38 years old 

All will be needed for approx 1-2 hours

This is a paid opportunity, looking at around £40-50 per hour 

Please DM me if available

Thank you!:)

items.text:
I’m a film director. On side I shoot portraits -
this month I'm opening my book to build out my Berlin portfolio by the price that you choose yourself 🙌

For: actors, musicians, writers, designers, freelancers, anyone in the Berlin creative world who needs strong images of themselves and is tired of looking like another LinkedIn headshot.

The offer: 

— Portraits, Polaroids and snaps 

— 30 min session, outdoor or studio in Kreuzberg 

— 10–15 edited images delivered the next day 

— Full usage rights, yours to do whatever you want with 

— Portfolio rate: €50–120, choose the price that fits you

I shoot the way I direct. I'll come in knowing who you are, I'll watch how you move, and we'll find what's actually in your character

Five slots left in May. DM me to book one.

items.text:
Daqui a pouco o último
LOVE de Ana Lázaro 

14 a 16 MAIO 
Quinta a sábado às 21h30

Auditório Municipal do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 
Biblioteca Municipal 
Online em BOL.PT
https://www.bol.pt/.../176809-love_de_ana_lazaro-aud_m.../

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil.
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde, em tantas partes do mundo, se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans. Sejam estes direitos concretos na legislação, sejam eles no combate a amarras de pensamento e dogmatismos vários.
As dinâmicas de híper conectividade da vida virtual - nas quais se encontram grandes benefícios mas simultaneamente perigos e assoberbamento – colocam-nos perante cenários de comparação, a insegurança; as falsas verdades e desconfiança; solidão – aos quais simultaneamente pertencem mas querem também escapar. Arquiteturas de um mundo digital – uma segunda realidade e uma segunda pele - que parece altamente acolhedor e inteiramente hostil.

com  JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA 
projeto TÁS NA MIRA 
coordenadora  INÊS MARCELINO
ISABELA JOÃO, ROSALBA MBANG, VANECIA RODRIGUES 

encenação, espaço cénico  MARIA JOÃO LUÍS 
vídeo  JOSÉ BUDHA
música  JAIME FILIPE 
assistência de encenação  SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO
assistência de produção  FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA 
direção de produção, luz  PEDRO DOMINGOS 

produção  TEATRO DA TERRA  2026
M/12

parceria
Município do Seixal

apoio 
República Portuguesa - Cultura, Juventude, Desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy** 
**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

Faculty: 
**Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia 🇭🇷 
**Remith Ramesh**, India 🇮🇳 
**Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark 🇩🇰 
**Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany 🇩🇪 

Guest artists: 
**Aparna Devi**, India 🇮🇳 
**Claudia Munyengabe**, Burundi 🇧🇮 
**Tarja Nyberg**, Finland 🇫🇮 
**Toh Varatta**, Thailand 🇹🇭 
**Burcu Halacoglu**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Gehad Hossam El Din**, Egypt 🇪🇬 

>> Michael Chekhov Acting Technique 
>> Organic Breathing & Image Work
>> Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre (Kerala, India) 
>> Physical Theatre and Dance (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 
>> The Actor’s Energy and Presence 
>> Intercultural Theatre in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS** 
This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**
There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 
The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/
Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

**Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark 🇩🇰 
**Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany 🇩🇪 

Guest artists: 
**Aparna Devi**, India 🇮🇳 
**Claudia Munyengabe**, Burundi 🇧🇮 
**Tarja Nyberg**, Finland 🇫🇮 
**Toh Varatta**, Thailand 🇹🇭 
**Burcu Halacoglu**, Turkey 🇹🇷 
**Gehad Hossam El Din**, Egypt 🇪🇬 

>> Michael Chekhov Acting Technique 
>> Organic Breathing & Image Work
>> Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre (Kerala, India) 
>> Physical Theatre and Dance (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 
>> The Actor’s Energy and Presence 
>> Intercultural Theatre in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS** 
This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**
There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 
The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/
Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de
items.title: **CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy**

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn ‘’Leon’’  24.05.26 godz. 10.30 – 15.00**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje mężczyzy w wieku 45 – 50 lat o obwodzie w klatce 100/105 cm, pas 95 - 105 ) do roli wuja głównej bohaterki. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic w różnym wieku. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 2 3 tygodniowym. Plan zdjęciowy jest przewidziany na 24.05.26 godz. 10.30 – 15.00 w Gliwicach.

** **

**Od kwietnia 2026 ** zaczęliśmy powoli  realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni.

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

Więcej informacji na Priv

** **

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w czerwcu, w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn w różnym wieku do następujących ról:

1. Szymon Jeziorowski (23) – Manipulant, chciwy i chytry, ale gra dobrego gościa.

Data: 03. i 04. czerwca
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

2. Narkoman 1 (30) - narkoman. Brudny i zaniedbany. 

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Norbert Kolski (32) – ojciec 2-letniego Jasia. Samotnie wychowuje syna, odkąd rozstał się z żoną, przez jej problemy alkoholowe. Jest troskliwym (momentami nadmiernie) i dobrym ojcem. W relacjach z żoną jednak łatwo wpada w złość. Pracownik korpo.

Daty: 01. i 05. czerwca
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

4. Adrian Kowalski (34) – napakowany dresiarz, twarz kryminalisty. 

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto

5. Radosław Zacharski (39) – informator policji z poznańskiego ABN.

Data: 03. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto

6. Informator (41) – typ spod ciemnej gwiazdy. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 03. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Konrad Potępa (42) –  elegancki wspólnik Jerzego. Impulsywny i wybuchowy. Najpierw powie, potem pomyśli.

Data: 03. i 04. czerwca
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

8. Jerzy Jeziorowski (45) – typ pewnego siebie, twardego faceta, skupionego na pracy. W scenariuszu jest ubrany w strój sportowy do biegania.  

Data: 03. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto

9. Adam Sapliński (49) – prawnik Adeli. Elegancki, rzeczowy adwokat.

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 300 zł netto

10.Taksówkarz (40-60)  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
Moi drodzy ✋
Od 21 czerwca rozpoczynamy próby z moim autorskim bandem Inside do dużego koncertu - Dni Limanowej. To dwudniowe wydarzenie odbędzie się już 11.07.2026. Obok nas na scenie grupa Red Lips. W zastępstwie na gitarze basowej legenda wśród polskich basistów Tomasz Kciuk Jaworski! Dzięki Tomek, że przyjąłeś moje zaproszenie 😉 Muzyka łączy pokolenia - jako młody chłopak słuchałem „namiętnie” bardzo dobrej płyty Kciuk Surzyn Band - Klucha w śpiewnik. Zapraszam serdecznie! 

Wystąpią: 

Rafał Potoniec - bębny 
Paula Stróżewska Beltrán - wokal 
Krystian Jaworz - instrumenty klawiszowe 
Piotr Sokolowski - gitara 
KCIUK-bass - gitara basowa 

https://www.inside.jazzbass.pl 

https://instagram.com/inside_band_music?igshid=OGQ5ZDc2ODk2ZA== 

https://youtube.com/@inside2 

https://www.facebook.com/2022inside 

https://www.tiktok.com/@rafalpotoniecinside?_t=8hmXi7rsqXJ&_r=1 

https://open.spotify.com/artist/7jHSJh6b6j3DwLT3vnj2gA 

#acidjazzmusic #funkmusic #soulmusic #rnbmusic #smoothjazzmusic

items.text:
Hey everyone,

my name is Kai and I’m currently based in London.

I’ve been consistently training in acting and already have experience in front of the camera through modeling, as well as being involved in a few independent short film and creative projects.

Working on camera and being part of creative productions is something I genuinely enjoy, so I’m open to all kinds of opportunities — short films, music videos, student productions, commercials, fashion/editorial shoots and other creative projects. 🙌🏻

Languages: English & German  
Height: 178 cm  
Available for castings & self tapes

items.title: Hey everyone,

items.text:
***Casting Call - Toots***

We at Pineal Dreams Productions are deep into production on our fourth in-house film - Ouroboros - as well as working on a tangential project - Through The Doorway.

We have a pretty healthy track record of success, picking up 23 festival submissions and 15 awards through our first three works - Inside The Abyss (2022), Our Father (2024), And BARDO (2025)

We are delighted to announce we will be teaming up with T.A.F Productions and director Andy Cory for a short-film written by Joshua Moulinié (who will be acting as co-producer) - Toots.

We are casting for one actress - and this will be a dual role which we believe will give the chosen candidate a fantastic chance to develop experience, showcase their talent - as well as walk away with a fantastic showreel of footage featuring just themselves.

It also a PAID role (though quite minimal, as it is a self-funded indie project)

***Character Profile :  C/ Shadow C***

The story of Toots is a very simple one - as one person is forced to confront a manifestation of their own conscience and forced via a conversation to accept their mistakes, who they are, and come to terms with the consequences of their actions.

C is a mysterious character at first. She is deeply in denial about her own flaws, confrontational and quick to anger. As the conversation progresses, we learn more about her dual-nature and the inner conflict she has between accepting who she is and taking responsibility for her own decisions/choices - and passing the blame to the trauma that she has gone through. Despite the short being one lengthy scene, essentially, C is a very complex character with a lot of layers that get peeled away as the story progresses.

Shadow C is a combination of C’s subconscious ID (her inner truth or shadow-self) but while acting in an antagonistic way towards C - she is actually her own conscience. She is simply C’s buried regrets and self-awareness, trying to make her understand who she is, so that she can finally change, grow and move on from the past. She is a helper, not an enemy.

The ideal candidate would be:

* A young actress (20-25) looking for that break-out role that could really elevate them
* Somebody prepared to take on the challenge of an entire short (Only 16 pages, so probably 20 minutes maximum) where they are the only cast member, and it would be built entirely around them.
* Somebody who is a particularly strong character actor, capable of playing two halves of one person with convincing distinction.

Filming Details:

* Two tapes will be expected for the audition based on material sent over. One to see each version of C.
* 
* Details of filming are yet to be confirmed - but will be within the greater London region.

* Filming dates are expected to be around 2 months after casting - allowing the actress enough time to prepare properly for the role.

* The likely filming days total would be around 2 perhaps 3. (Though if extra days were needed, this can be discussed and payment adjusted accordingly)

* Filming likely to place in August and be wrapped within the same month. (Though this could change due to circumstance)

This is a PAID role (though minimal, as we are an independent studio). Transport and food of course also covered - and you can select any 3 minutes of your own choice for showreel material once the film is completed.

The film is an exploration of the inner struggle of trying to accept the difference between what happened to you - your traumas - and who you are inherently as a human being. While a simple film - taking place in only two locations - it is a relatively complex theme and asks some interesting questions about what it means to be human. What makes a person a bad person, and what is just a mistake. Who are we? Ourselves, or what happened to us?

This a film that would likely appeal to somebody with an interest in arthouse cinema.

Anybody with interest please either Email:

[Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk](mailto:Andygrim_model@outlook.co.uk)

[Moulinie23@gmail.com](mailto:Moulinie23@gmail.com)

Kind Regards,

Joshua Moulinié

items.text:
Individual audition slots are filled!
DM or email 
DarkTheatreDale@proton.me 
For your information and submission pack 

🎥 Video submissions close 26 May 2026

Dark Theatre Rochdale ·  St Aidan's Church Hall ·  29–31 October 2026 

Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill's 
The incendiary play presented by Dark Theatre Rochdale for the UK Amateur Premiere. 

This is Dracula as a satirical dissection — the monster is not the fangs. 
The monster is entitlement, grooming, and the casual exercise of power over other people. 

He is charming. You would like him. That is the point.

The women of this story were always the most intelligent people in the room. 

This time, they get the ending they earned.

🎭 Auditions on 30/31 May by appointment 
 

“DRACULA” is presented through special arrangement with and all authorised performance materials are supplied by TRW PLAYS www.trwplays.co.uk

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #Auditions

✨ CASTING CALL ✨
📍 Colorado Springs, Denver & surrounding areas

Due to an overwhelming increase in bookings — including frequent double and triple bookings — Once Upon A Dream is currently looking to expand our dream team of professional character performers!

As our cast continues to grow, we are actively working toward expanding authentic and diverse representation within these roles and are especially seeking performers of color for our Huntrix casting needs. Performers of Asian descent especially are strongly encouraged to apply!

Roles Needed: Rumi, Mira, Zoey, and all Saja boys.

What We’re Looking For:

✨ Comfortable performing in character and interacting with kids
✨ Great with children (experience with special needs children is a HUGE bonus!)
✨Acting skills (singing is a plus, but not required)
✨Flexible weekend availability
✨Reliable, enthusiastic, and passionate about creating magical memories

No professional training required — just heart, commitment, and a love for bringing stories to life. Training will be provided. 

💌 Interested in joining the magic?

• DM us via any of our social media platforms
• Text (719) 246-7591, or
• Email onceuponadream.co@outlook.com 

#coloradosprings #performers #theaterlife #characterperformers #castingcall

007 CASTING AGENCY

Where Talent Meets Opportunity

EXCLUSIVE CASTING CALL — SOUTH AFRICAN COMMERCIAL CAMPAIGN

007 Casting Agency is currently seeking authentic South African talent for an upcoming premium TV commercial campaign filming in Sri Lanka for the South African market.

 MOM ROLE

We are seeking a Black South African woman who feels warm, grounded, natural, and genuinely relatable.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 30–35

• Medium-to-deep brown skin tone

• Natural 4B/4C hair or authentic cultural styling

• Healthy natural skin texture

• Warm smile and expressive eyes

• Soft, approachable features

• Genuine maternal energy

• Contemporary suburban South African presence

• No overly glamorous, editorial, or fashion-model aesthetics

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PINK LADY ROLE

We are seeking someone energetic, humorous, charismatic, and naturally confident.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 20–30

• Medium-to-deep brown complexion

• Authentic Black South African features

• Natural textured African hair

• Athletic and physically active

• Relatable, vibrant presence rather than high-fashion or editorial

📍 IMPORTANT INFORMATION

Shoot Location: Sri Lanka
Tentative Shoot Dates: 12th–15th June 2026
Shoot Duration: 1 day
Usage: 2-year buyout for the South African market

All applicants must have a valid passport.

Talent Budget:
Up to R37,000

Final rates and contractual terms will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.

Production Covers:

- Return flights

- Hotel accommodation

- Per diem

📩 SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS

Please submit the following:

Updated comp card (including name, age, and contact details)

Professional studio headshot

Medium shot

Full-length photographs

Introduction video filmed in landscape mode

Submit via WhatsApp/Email
0692215294
info.007casting@gmail.com

Submission Deadline:
20th May 2026

Serious applicants only.

007 Casting Agency reserves the right to shortlist suitable candidates before client presentation.

INDUSTRY FEDERATION ASSOCIATION FILM CORPORATION UNION संघटनेचे उइंहिष्ट कलाकार तंत्रज्ञांसाठी एक मजबूत व्यासपीठ कायदेशीर मदत मार्गदर्शन रोजगाराच्या संधी व प्रोजेक्ट्सची माहिती DIRECTOR कौशल्य विकास व वर्कशॉप्स सन्मान, सुरक्षा व हक्कांसाठी लढा या नव्या परिवाराचा भाग व्हा आणि फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीच्या प्रगतीत सहभागी व्हा! रोहित प्रकाशशेठ पारख फिल्म मेकर 9850049002 PRODU CTION SCENE TAЖE ROLL DIRECTOR CAMERA DATE'

sharedPost.text:
Next Level Acting...Next Level You

Three days. One technique. No limits.

The Meisner Technique is one of the most powerful acting methods in the world — and this June, we’re bringing it to Central London.
Meisner Foundation Course

📅 8, 9 & 10 June
🕐 11am – 3pm
📍 Central London

Three days. Twelve hours. A completely new relationship with your craft.
DM us or email hello@meisnerlondon.com to secure your place.
#MeisnerTechnique #ActingLondon #LondonActors #ActingWorkshop #Meisner ActingTraining TheatreLondon

Do hot teledysku popularnych wokalistek poszukujemy:

✨ EPIZODYSTKA – BABCIA
💸 700 zł netto (do 4h na planie)
👵 Kobieta 65+
Szukamy słodkiej, cool babci, która wcieli się w rolę tatuatorki 💥🖤

✨ 3 STATYSTKI
💸 150 zł netto (do 3h na planie)
💅 Klientki salonu piękności
Kobiety 20–45 lat, wizerunkowo pasujące do scen w salonie beauty

📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa
📄 Prawa: na wszystko, bez ograniczeń czasowych i terytorialnych

items.text:
Cześć! Poszukuję utalentowanego i zaangażowanego kolorysty / kolorystki, który/a pomoże nadać ostateczny kolor mojej najnowszej etiudzie fabularnej.

Czego oczekuję?
Doświadczenia w pracy z programem DaVinci Resolve (lub pokrewnym).
• Świadomości dramaturgii koloru i tego, jak wpływa on na emocje widza

Materiały do portfolio:
Wpis w napisach końcowych oraz oznaczenie we wszystkich materiałach promocyjnych i festiwalowych.

items.text:
Do filmu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy zdolnego kolorysty, który nie boi się eksperymentować z formą.

**Szczegóły współpracy:**
 
* 💻 **Zadanie:** Color grading gotowego obrazu (sceny futurystyczne, taneczne).
 
* 💰 **Forma:** Projekt non-profit (pasjonacki).
 
* 🚀 **Cel:** Stworzenie wizualnego projektu do portfolio i na festiwale.

**Co oferujemy?**
 * Ciekawy, plastyczny materiał wyjściowy.
 * Miejsce w napisach końcowych, promocję na stronie filmu.

Jeśli chcesz pokazać, co potrafisz wycisnąć z obrazu, napisz do nas w wiadomości prywatnej! Prześlij swoje demo-reel lub przykładowe prace.
