items.text:
**LAST MINUTE CASTING CALL (Tomorrow!)**

I’m currently looking for a model for a very experimental ‘data corruption’ style photoshoot for May 19th (Tomorrow) at 5-8PM for a stock photography platform. Attached is a mini moodboard.

Portfolio:[ https://aedriansalazarphoto.myportfolio.com/](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Faedriansalazarphoto.myportfolio.com%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSW5jcDk2UGVBNUNJelZjanNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7NDGNaRmRQ8MYqQim7-6540B1aaeaRZgFXayGJKVPxgw3C_3ernGHYU-uW6Q_aem_sxH5O9VCxtyuAcgiwYWeZA&h=AUC725ucZtwjxyaKVZMffhzMOWOmtPg9uDkqizTwctcwgYLfb8Q6E5pVhno9tKogz6e8FRqLUU6QmfGWcBTu7SFFVdwTG_G0rUapITmfHz_2C9jSFKYsX77SxlPTtOHpMJhiNaG1Sld_t69q1Ay4RA&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUALmz-Q4AHixBhK-mJXZCI7NMqP29_46wFuvodVyn4e_hfkwvATcj8GkqGPq0Cf9dLWlF3NUXStl5A0yJ0AZltKlyFpKQi8W1PT5eOkk9beHOxJl4KBwgjZDK3Rp51jgsjHNOCdXjsB1oWAYVO-vgou92QOwUx40nTeTLspYird0whPChF3V-W-U7MpAFwOcpVQEeqW2DbRFhgAw5EQ32tNH4x8PQ4)

Info:

Compensation: $125 CAD 

Date: May 19th, 5-8 PM

Location: SFU Burnaby Campus (Field 2)

Usage: Stock (perpetual, commercial usage)

What you’ll do: Walk and pose (very simple stuff)

Requirements:

You have black hair

You’re between 5' 9'' and 6' 0''

You have an all-black outfit (black blazer, minimal style, no visible logos/trademarks preferred)

NOTES:

Participant will be required to sign a model release form before the shoot

If interested, please let me know and send a picture of you!

Kamed Studio 
17 maja - niedziela 
Stawka 120 zł. płatne gotówką po planie 
Gramy klientów galerii handlowej 
Lokalizacja WAWER
Plan od godzin porannych

Na plan serialu współczesnego szukamy statystów w różnym wieku jako klientów sklepu 

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o zgłoszenia z aktualnym zdjęciem I nr telefonu na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

Dopisek w tytule GALERIA

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie nadesłanych zdjęć 

Zapraszamy tylko osoby, które bez problemu same dojadą na plan

items.text:
Hi everyone!

We’re casting Denver locals for an ad campaign for the Denver Museum of Nature and Science.

We’re looking for various types of people:

- Real families of four (kids ages 7-12, parents 35-45)

- Men and women ages 35-45

- Kids aged 5-15

- Real couples and individuals ages 20-30

- Real couples and individuals ages 55-65

Rate: 

Shoot $250
Buyout $500
Fitting $150 (4 hrs)

Fitting Date: Jun 24, 2026

Shoot Date: Jun 26, 2026

To submit, email a recent picture to Casting@FuturisticFilms.com (please put DMNS and the role you’re submitting for in the subject line)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'STUART STUARTSTONE STONE CASTING CASTING: DENVER LOCALS For Denver Museum of Nature and Science Ad Campaign email Casting@FuturisticFilms.com Casting com for info PAID JOB SUBMISSION DEADLINE: 6/4'

items.text:
Casting call for "The Hero Complex."

A heartfelt short film about a superhero discovering self-care for the first time. For all of us who feel like the weight of the world is too much to carry.

Production Title: The Hero Complex

Genre: Drama

Production Type: Indie

Run Time: 10 minutes

Compensation: none

Looking for Extras. Age 18 and older 

Shooting Location: Broomfield, CO

Date is Monday, 5/25, 10am - 1pm

Email: herocomplexshortfilm@gmail.com if interested.

sharedPost.text:
Angela Boehm Casting is looking for a MALE DOUBLE for a Documentary that will be filming in the Cleveland, OH area likely on May 30th, 2026 (STILL TBD). 

DETAILS:
Project: Documentary
Filming Location: CLEVELAND OH Area (TBD)
Shoot Date(s): LIKELY Saturday 5.30 (TBD, will need to list conflicts around this date in your submission)
Pay Rate: $200 + 20% Agent Fee

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:
Gender: MALE
Ethnicity: White/Caucasian
Age: 30s - 50s

MAN YOU ARE DOUBLING:
Link to Photo: https://bit.ly/ABCDocumentary
Please only submit if you feel that you look like this man. If you happen to know someone that looks like this man, feel free to share this post with them!

HOW TO SUBMIT:
In order to submit for this role, please send an email to team@angelaboehmcasting.com.

SUBJECT: Documentary Double - (YOUR FULL NAME)

PLEASE INCLUDE:
- Age
- Height / Weight
- 1-2 Portrait Photo(s)
- 1-2 Full-Body Photo(s)
- Any conflicts on/around Saturday, May 30th.

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team
PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.
